title: For anybody else that has the 10 complete book
display_title: For anybody else that has the 10 complete book
wikitext:
[]: For anybody else that has the 1.0 complete book             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:00 pm Since iv been bored with no big news after the new trailer I started looking back over that exspensive hardcover 1.0 book that comes with the storyboards.And while looking at the story board b book icame across something kind of weird in the storyboard for the 2.0 preview. the last two frames are kind of different than what got in. Its of the scene where mari is lookink at the giant glowing crosses,but instead of just standing thre it looks like shes lifting something in the air with things on the ground around her?And in the next frame it looks like she is pushing her glasses up the same way Gendo does.I maybe reading too mutch into this but i thought those with the book might want to check it out.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:02 pm Whoa. Can you take a picture of the page?

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:29 pm Don't hotlink to 4chan, images get purged and then the image link is broken within a day Its the last two frames. you cant see it in the photo but i think she is facing the camera instead of looking at the crosses.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:37 pm Looks like she's doing the 'otaku pushing up glasses' pose. I can't tell what she's doing in the other one, but the text beside the pictures should give us a clue. I want to look these compounds up now, and I think you've hit on something here. This is extremely interesting so thanks for bringing it up (and taking pictures). Do you have a picture of the whole page? Some text is going down vertically through a couple frames.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:53 pm Also in the story boards both the white giant in nerv and the one on the moon have the old seele mask.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:04 pm Is this in the 'perfect collection' (what did you buy)? I wonder why they made such huge changes.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:09 pm its here http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=1825&genre=30_book&page=&key=&8%A1%E04=2%A1%DE0

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:18 pm ZOMG, the Gendo push! 'cuz we know only Gendo does that. And that smirk's totally Asuka like! Ikari/Soryu descendant confirmed! Gooo Sequel-Theory! Seriously though, what the hell is that next to her, on the one with the crosses? A pig (and other animals)?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:20 pm We need to get Reichu on this shit.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:31 pm To me it looks like rabbits next to her.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Raven » Wed Mar 25, 2009 10:20 pm The picture isn't loading for me. Would you mind uploading it on Imageshack or Photobucket?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Thu Mar 26, 2009 5:37 am I always thought that trailers were made out of preexisting shots. They animated the trailer at the same time as 1.0? Well, they wouldn't have enough 2.0 shots at that time, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:49 am I don't see any text that labels the blobs on the ground. Also, dead image link is dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Mar 26, 2009 10:14 am *Sigh* It seems everyone doesn't yet know how to use an online photo host site. Hot linking is a no no Lagann. Please post those pics agian. I'd really like to see what your talking about

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Thu Mar 26, 2009 12:03 pm http://img293.imageshack.us/my.php?image=snapshot20090325.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Mar 26, 2009 12:07 pm Lagann wrote: http://img293.imageshack.us/my.php?image=snapshot20090325.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by RockManBalls » Thu Mar 26, 2009 12:17 pm Lagann wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Mar 26, 2009 12:24 pm RockManBalls wrote: It does say that she's using the same gesture as "Ge," and I'm sure we who that is.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Mar 26, 2009 12:27 pm Well, even if such a relation was planned at the time, or maybe even later, despite this reference not making it into the final thing (for some other reason then)... There was so much time in between, for all we know they could have thrown their entire concept from then away and do something completely different.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Thu Mar 26, 2009 12:29 pm At least we know Kaworu is likely wearing his plug suit in the above picture. Regarding Mari: They enjoy doing this to us, don't they.
